title: meibomia radiata
intro: Meibomia radiata, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a plant species that belongs to the milkweed family (Asclepiadaceae). It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Meibomia radiata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots can also be used to make a salve or cream for topical application.
